title: Ship <beskid-hub> web component and platform-spec catalog generation

source.subject: feat(docs,hub): add <beskid-hub> web component and platform-spec catalog generation. (#7)

body:
Custom element `<beskid-hub>` (later extracted to `beskid_web_common`) plus trudoc `generate-platform-spec-catalog.mjs` and catalog tests wire cross-app navigation and platform-spec browse metadata into site prebuild.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`1e73032`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/1e73032)
- **Subject:** feat(docs,hub): add <beskid-hub> web component and platform-spec catalog generation. (#7)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `platform-docs-dx`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`

## What shipped

Custom element `<beskid-hub>` (later extracted to `beskid_web_common`) plus trudoc `generate-platform-spec-catalog.mjs` and catalog tests wire cross-app navigation and platform-spec browse metadata into site prebuild.
